name: PDA-Anchored ALG-LAM-PEDOT Electrode-Window Interphase
scope_lock_action: Lock the PDA/primer chemistry, electrode-window mask, extract-blank fields, and single-coupon H-A/H-B rescue trigger before any live-cell work.
near_term_test: Add one anchored lead article to H-B electrochemical/physical stability only after the acellular H-A blank passes for the unanchored low-dose lead.

name: All-Dry Zwitterionic Gradient External-Fluidic Coating
scope_lock_action: Lock coated-surface placement, fouling/adsorption readouts, extract-blank fields, and ZRC Phase A trigger before procurement or coating outreach.
near_term_test: Run as a coating-on-housing comparator after ZRC-ND Phase A sentinel defines whether adsorption/fouling is the limiting failure mode.

name: Alg-Gel PEDOT/PPy Low-Oxidant Biointerface Comparator
scope_lock_action: Lock material identity, procurement route, source-file classes, and a tiny acellular witness-coupon acceptance table.
near_term_test: Use only after ALG-LAM-PEDOT H-A/H-B establishes a baseline; run as an acellular H-B conductivity/stability comparator with strict extract and shedding fields.

name: Zwitterionic PEDOT:PSS Hydrated Electrode Hydrogel
scope_lock_action: Lock material identity, procurement route, source-file classes, and a tiny acellular witness-coupon acceptance table.
near_term_test: Do not displace ALG-LAM-PEDOT yet; use as a later comparator if acellular extract and impedance data look better than the alginate-laminin lead.

name: PEDOT:sGAGh Electronic ECM Signal Hydrogel
scope_lock_action: Lock material identity, procurement route, source-file classes, and a tiny acellular witness-coupon acceptance table.
near_term_test: Keep behind ALG-LAM-PEDOT until a small H-A/H-B witness coupon can show clean extract behavior, stable pH/osmolality/conductivity, retained BDNF/laminin signal, and no delamination.

name: Hydrogel-Actuated Multilayer 3D Organoid MEA Interface
